_comment: React Doctor scope-overrides. See https://react.doctor for the full rule list. The `ignore.overrides` array suppresses individual rules in surfaces where the pattern is intentional and safe.

overrides._why: Inline theme script — pre-paint flash prevention. The HTML is built from a static template literal at build time (no user input), so no XSS surface.
JSON-LD structured-data injection. The payload is `JSON.stringify(jsonLd)` of a typed object — not user HTML. SEO surface convention.

Server actions are authorized through the `withAdmin` / `withAuth` / `withDbRead` decorators in `app/actions/db/_authz.ts` and `lib/server/session.ts`. The static analyzer doesn't recognize that pattern and reports a false positive on every action body.

`autoFocus` is intentional UX inside modals + click-to-edit cells: when the surface opens, focus jumps to the first/active input. WCAG 2.5.3 isn't violated because the modal is itself an explicit user action (the open event focuses the input the user just summoned).
